Pass-1 (search) time = 50.131857 seconds
Pass-2 (emit) time = 50.830531 seconds
Mode = from-files (batch is NOT the whole search)
Batch files = 1
Prefixes in batch = 1
Number of max snakes found = 79
Longest snake in batch = 82 edges
Snake paths:
